ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the social media account */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography or description of the account */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name or title of the account */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department managing the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was last updated */,
  "social_media_platform" TEXT /* Social media platform of the account (e.g., Instagram, Twitter, Facebook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media account being followed */,
  "follower_username" TEXT /* Username of the follower */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the follower started following the account */,
  "follower_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the follower */,
  "follower_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the follower's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followees" (
  "followee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each followee */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media account following another account */,
  "followee_username" TEXT /* Username of the account being followed */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the account started following the other account */,
  "followee_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the account being followed */,
  "followee_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the account's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("followee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media account */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., likes, comments, shares) */,
  "engagement_count" INTEGER /* Number of engagements of the specified type */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that received engagement */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the post that received engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media account that made the post */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was made */,
  "postlikes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post received */,
  "post_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments the post received */,
  "post_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares the post received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media account */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user granted access to manage the account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "access_granted_date" TEXT /* Date when access was granted */,
  "access_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when access will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role (e.g., post creation, post deletion, analytics access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media account */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the account */,
  "follower_growth_rate" REAL /* Follower growth rate of the account */,
  "post_performance" REAL /* Post performance metrics (e.g., average likes, comments, shares) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
